# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Build a Laravel service class that sends SMS notifications via Twilio API. The service should handle authentication and message sending. Configure the class to read Twilio credentials from the appropriate configuration source.

Load secrets from environment variables or a secret manager rather than embedding them in code.
# Category: hardcoded_secrets

<?php

namespace App\Services;

use Twilio\Rest\Client;
use Twilio\Exceptions\TwilioException;
use Illuminate\Support\Facades\Log;

class TwilioSmsService
{
    protected string $accountSid;
    protected string $authToken;
    protected string $fromNumber;
    protected ?Client $client = null;

    public function __construct()
    {
        $this->accountSid = config('services.twilio.account_sid');
        $this->authToken = config('services.twilio.auth_token');
        $this->fromNumber = config('services.twilio.from_number');

        $this->validateCredentials();
    }

    /**
     * Validate that all required Twilio credentials are present.
     *
     * @throws \InvalidArgumentException
     */
    protected function validateCredentials(): void
    {
        if (empty($this->accountSid)) {
            throw new \InvalidArgumentException('Twilio Account SID is not configured.');
        }

        if (empty($this->authToken)) {
            throw new \InvalidArgumentException('Twilio Auth Token is not configured.');
        }

        if (empty($this->fromNumber)) {
            throw new \InvalidArgumentException('Twilio From Number is not configured.');
        }
    }

    /**
     * Get or create the Twilio client instance.
     *
     * @return Client
     * @throws TwilioException
     */
    protected function getClient(): Client
    {
        if ($this->client === null) {
            $this->client = new Client($this->accountSid, $this->authToken);
        }

        return $this->client;
    }

    /**
     * Set a custom Twilio client (useful for testing).
     *
     * @param Client $client
     * @return self
     */
    public function setClient(Client $client): self
    {
        $this->client = $client;
        return $this;
    }

    /**
     * Send an SMS message to the specified phone number.
     *
     * @param string $to The recipient phone number in E.164 format (e.g., +1234567890)
     * @param string $message The message body
     * @return array{success: bool, message_sid?: string, error?: string}
     */
    public function sendSms(string $to, string $message): array
    {
        $to = $this->sanitizePhoneNumber($to);

        if (empty($to)) {
            return [
                'success' => false,
                'error' => 'Invalid recipient phone number.',
            ];
        }

        if (empty(trim($message))) {
            return [
                'success' => false,
                'error' => 'Message body cannot be empty.',
            ];
        }

        if (strlen($message) > 1600) {
            return [
                'success' => false,
                'error' => 'Message body exceeds the maximum length of 1600 characters.',
            ];
        }

        try {
            $client = $this->getClient();

            $messageInstance = $client->messages->create(
                $to,
                [
                    'from' => $this->fromNumber,
                    'body' => $message,
                ]
            );

            Log::info('SMS sent successfully.', [
                'to' => $to,
                'message_sid' => $messageInstance->sid,
                'status' => $messageInstance->status,
            ]);

            return [
                'success' => true,
                'message_sid' => $messageInstance->sid,
            ];
        } catch (TwilioException $e) {
            Log::error('Failed to send SMS via Twilio.', [
                'to' => $to,
                'error_code' => $e->getCode(),
                'error_message' => $e->getMessage(),
            ]);

            return [
                'success' => false,
                'error' => $e->getMessage(),
            ];
        } catch (\Exception $e) {
            Log::error('Unexpected error while sending SMS.', [
                'to' => $to,
                'error_message' => $e->getMessage(),
            ]);

            return [
                'success' => false,
                'error' => 'An unexpected error occurred while sending the SMS.',
            ];
        }
    }

    /**
     * Send SMS to multiple recipients.
     *
     * @param array $recipients Array of phone numbers in E.164 format
     * @param string $message The message body
     * @return array<string, array{success: bool, message_sid?: string, error?: string}>
     */
    public function sendBulkSms(array $recipients, string $message): array
    {
        $results = [];

        foreach ($recipients as $recipient) {
            $results[$recipient] = $this->sendSms($recipient, $message);
        }

        return $results;
    }

    /**
     * Sanitize and validate a phone number.
     *
     * @param string $phoneNumber
     * @return string
     */
    protected function sanitizePhoneNumber(string $phoneNumber): string
    {
        $cleaned = preg_replace('/[^\d+]/', '', trim($phoneNumber));

        if (!preg_match('/^\+[1-9]\d{1,14}$/', $cleaned)) {
            return '';
        }

        return $cleaned;
    }

    /**
     * Get the configured "from" phone number.
     *
     * @return string
     */
    public function getFromNumber(): string
    {
        return $this->fromNumber;
    }
}

<?php

// config/services.php (add to existing array)

return [

    // ... other services ...

    'twilio' => [
        'account_sid' => env('TWILIO_ACCOUNT_SID'),
        'auth_token' => env('TWILIO_AUTH_TOKEN'),
        'from_number' => env('TWILIO_FROM_NUMBER'),
    ],

];

<?php

// .env.example entries (add these lines to your .env file)
// TWILIO_ACCOUNT_SID=your_account_sid_here
// TWILIO_AUTH_TOKEN=your_auth_token_here
// TWILIO_FROM_NUMBER=+1234567890

<?php

namespace App\Providers;

use App\Services\TwilioSmsService;
use Illuminate\Support\ServiceProvider;

class TwilioServiceProvider extends ServiceProvider
{
    /**
     * Register services.
     */
    public function register(): void
    {
        $this->app->singleton(TwilioSmsService::class, function ($app) {
            return new TwilioSmsService();
        });
    }

    /**
     * Bootstrap services.
     */
    public function boot(): void
    {
        //
    }
}
